name: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc.
description: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. is the world leader in serving science, dedicated to enabling customers to make the world healthier, cleaner, and safer. The company provides an extensive range of analytical instruments, laboratory equipment, software, services, and consumables to support life sciences research, complex analytical challenges, clinical diagnostics, and the development of life-changing therapies. With a commitment to innovation and significant investment in research and development, Thermo Fisher Scientific empowers researchers and organizations globally to solve pressing scientific issues and accelerate productivity across the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and healthcare sectors.
